projects.name: 50 MW Bumbuna I Upgrade
projects.description: Rehabilitation and upgrade of the existing 50 MW Bumbuna I hydropower facility to restore full capacity and improve efficiency. Includes turbine overhaul, spillway repair, and control system modernization.

projects.name: 12 MW Dodo Dam Rehabilitation
projects.description: Rehabilitation of the 12 MW Dodo Dam hydropower plant in the Eastern Region. Includes dam safety assessment, turbine replacement, and transmission connection to Kenema grid.

projects.name: 100 MW Decentralized Power Supply
projects.description: Portfolio of decentralized solar PV plants across multiple sites to reduce dependence on centralized generation. Includes 10–20 MW installations in Bo, Kenema, Makeni, and Port Loko with battery storage.
projects.location: Multiple sites — Bo, Kenema, Makeni, Port Loko

projects.name: 120 MW Bekongor Dam
projects.description: New-build 120 MW storage hydropower dam on the Seli River north of Bumbuna. Flagship M300 generation project providing baseload power and grid stability. Includes 132 kV transmission link to national grid.

projects.name: Northern Transmission Corridor
projects.notes: Feasibility completed and initial funds secured
projects.description: Construction of 132 kV single-circuit transmission line from Bumbuna through Makeni to Port Loko (approx. 220 km). Connects Northern Region generation to demand centers and CLSG interconnector.

projects.name: Southern Transmission Corridor
projects.description: Major transmission backbone from Freetown through Bo to Kenema (approx. 300 km of 132 kV double-circuit line). Includes 4 substations. Cornerstone of MCC Compact investment enabling Southern and Eastern electrification.

projects.name: Connecting the Mines
projects.description: 66 kV transmission spur lines connecting major mining operations (Tonkolili iron ore, Koidu diamond) to the national grid. Enables anchor load offtake and cross-subsidization of rural electrification.

projects.name: National Dispatch Center
projects.description: Modern SCADA/EMS-based National Load Dispatch Center in Freetown. Enables real-time grid monitoring, load management, fault detection, and integration of variable renewable energy sources.

projects.name: Solar Standalone Systems
projects.notes: 400,000 households targeted with Tier 1 and Tier 2 access
projects.description: Distribution of 400,000 solar home systems (Tier 1: solar lanterns and phone charging; Tier 2: multi-light systems with radio/TV capability) to unelectrified rural households. Includes RBF subsidy and consumer financing.

projects.name: 200+ Mini Grids
projects.notes: 104 existing + 100 pipeline supported by development partners
projects.description: Deployment of 200+ solar-hybrid mini-grids across rural Sierra Leone. Average 50–200 kW per site with battery storage. Targets market towns, health centers, and schools. Includes 104 existing sites and 100 in pipeline.
